---
title: "main"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-03"
---
Part 1

Function for 1.1-1.6:
```{r}
plot_ar2 <- function(phi1, phi2, subsection, n = 200, seed = 1) {
  
  # Create output directory if it doesn't exist
  if (!dir.exists("myndir")) dir.create("myndir")
  
  filename <- paste0("myndir/1_", subsection, "_ar2_phi1_", phi1, "_phi2_", phi2, ".pdf")
  
  
  set.seed(seed)
  
  # Try arima.sim, fall back to manual simulation if non-stationary
  sim_ar2 <- function() {
    tryCatch(
      arima.sim(model = list(ar = c(-phi1, -phi2)), n = n),
      error = function(e) {
        # Manual simulation for non-stationary case
        x <- numeric(n + 2)
        eps <- rnorm(n + 2)
        for (t in 3:(n + 2)) {
          x[t] <- -phi1 * x[t-1] - phi2 * x[t-2] + eps[t]
        }
        x[3:(n + 2)]
      }
    )
  }
  
  sims <- replicate(5, sim_ar2())
  
  # Theoretical ACF only for stationary processes
  ar_coeffs <- c(-phi1, -phi2)
  roots <- polyroot(c(1, -ar_coeffs))
  is_stationary <- all(Mod(roots) > 1)
  
  cols <- c("#E41A1C", "#377EB8", "#4DAF4A", "#984EA3", "#FF7F00")

  pdf(filename, width = 9, height = 8)
  par(mfrow = c(2, 1), mar = c(4, 4, 2, 1))
  
  # --- Simulations ---
  matplot(sims, type = "l", lty = 1, lwd = 1.2,
          col  = adjustcolor(cols, 0.8),
          xlab = "Time", ylab = expression(X[t]),
          main = bquote("AR(2):" ~ phi[1] == .(phi1) ~ "," ~ phi[2] == .(phi2)),
          las  = 1)
  abline(h = 0, lty = 2, col = "gray60")
  legend("topright", legend = paste("Realization", 1:5),
         col = adjustcolor(cols, 0.8), lwd = 1.2, lty = 1, bty = "n", cex = 0.75)
  
  # --- ACF ---
  n_bars <- 6; bar_w <- 0.12; gap <- 0.6
  positions <- seq(0, by = (n_bars * bar_w + gap), length.out = 31)
  
  plot(0, type = "n",
       xlim = c(-0.5, max(positions) + 0.5), ylim = c(-1, 1),
       xlab = "Lag k", ylab = expression(rho(k)),
       main = expression("ACF"),
       xaxt = "n", las = 1)
  axis(1, at = positions + (n_bars * bar_w)/2 - bar_w/2, labels = 0:30, cex.axis = 0.75)
  abline(h = 0, col = "gray40")
  abline(h =  1.96/sqrt(n), lty = 2, col = "gray60")
  abline(h = -1.96/sqrt(n), lty = 2, col = "gray60")
  
  # Theoretical bar (only if stationary)
  if (is_stationary) {
    rho <- ARMAacf(ar = c(-phi1, -phi2), lag.max = 30)
    segments(x0 = positions, y0 = 0, x1 = positions, y1 = rho,
             col = "black", lwd = 7, lend = 1)
  }
  
  for (i in 1:5) {
    emp  <- acf(sims[, i], lag.max = 30, plot = FALSE)
    xpos <- positions + i * bar_w
    segments(x0 = xpos, y0 = 0, x1 = xpos, y1 = as.numeric(emp$acf),
             col = adjustcolor(cols[i], 0.75), lwd = 3, lend = 1)
  }
  
  legend_labels <- if (is_stationary) c("Theoretical", paste("Realization", 1:5)) else paste("Realization", 1:5)
  legend_cols   <- if (is_stationary) c("black", adjustcolor(cols, 0.75)) else adjustcolor(cols, 0.75)
  legend_lwd    <- if (is_stationary) c(7, rep(3, 5)) else rep(3, 5)
  legend("topright", legend = legend_labels, col = legend_cols, lwd = legend_lwd,
         lty = 1, bty = "n", cex = 0.75, ncol = 2)
  
  dev.off()
  message("Saved: ", filename)
}
```
#1.3-1.6
```{r}
plot_ar2(phi1 = -0.6, phi2 =  0.5, subsection = "1-2")   # 1.1 & 1.2
plot_ar2(phi1 = -0.6, phi2 = -0.3, subsection = 3)   # 1.3
plot_ar2(phi1 =  0.6, phi2 = -0.3, subsection = 4)   # 1.4
plot_ar2(phi1 = -0.7, phi2 = -0.3, subsection = 5)   # 1.5
plot_ar2(phi1 = -0.75, phi2 = -0.3, subsection = 6)  # 1.6
```




Part 2
```{r}
# Read data
data <- read.csv("datasolar.csv")
Yt <- data$power

# Parameters
phi1  <- -0.38
Phi1  <- -0.94
mu    <- 5.72
sigma2 <- 0.22^2

# Transform to Xt
Xt <- log(Yt) - mu

# Compute residuals: Xt + phi1*Xt-1 + Phi1*Xt-12 + phi1*Phi1*Xt-13 = eps_t
n <- length(Xt)
eps <- rep(NA, n)
for (t in 14:n) {
  eps[t] <- Xt[t] + phi1 * Xt[t-1] + Phi1 * Xt[t-12] + phi1 * Phi1 * Xt[t-13]
}

# Extract the valid residuals
eps_valid <- eps[14:n]

# --- Model validation plots ---
if (!dir.exists("myndir")) dir.create("myndir")

pdf("myndir/2_1_residual_diagnostics.pdf", width = 9, height = 8)
par(mfrow = c(2, 2))

# 1. Residuals over time
plot(14:n, eps_valid, type = "b", xlab = "t", ylab = expression(hat(epsilon)[t]),
     main = "Residuals", las = 1)
abline(h = 0, lty = 2)

# 2. ACF
acf(eps_valid, main = "ACF of residuals", lag.max = 15)

# 3. Histogram
hist(eps_valid, breaks = 10, prob = TRUE, main = "Histogram of residuals",
     xlab = expression(hat(epsilon)[t]))
curve(dnorm(x, mean = 0, sd = 0.22), add = TRUE, col = "red", lwd = 2)

# 4. QQ-plot
qqnorm(eps_valid)
qqline(eps_valid, col = "red")

dev.off()
message("Saved: myndir/2_1_residual_diagnostics.pdf")
```
2.2:
```{r}
# --- 2.2: 12-month-ahead forecasts ---

# We already have Xt from 2.1
# Extend Xt with space for 12 forecasts
Xt_ext <- c(Xt, rep(NA, 12))

# Iterate predictions for k = 1, ..., 12
for (k in 1:12) {
  t_new <- 36 + k
  Xt_ext[t_new] <- -phi1 * Xt_ext[t_new - 1] - 
                    Phi1 * Xt_ext[t_new - 12] - 
                    phi1 * Phi1 * Xt_ext[t_new - 13]
}

# Transform back to power
Yhat <- exp(Xt_ext[37:48] + mu)

# Table
forecast_table <- data.frame(
  k = 1:12,
  month = ((data$month[36]) %% 12) + 1:12,
  month_label = month.abb[((data$month[36] + 0:11) %% 12) + 1],
  Yhat = round(Yhat, 1)
)
print(forecast_table)

# Plot
pdf("myndir/2_2_forecasts.pdf", width = 9, height = 5)

time_obs  <- 1:36
time_pred <- 37:48

plot(time_obs, Yt, type = "o", pch = 16,
     xlim = c(1, 48), ylim = c(0, max(c(Yt, Yhat)) * 1.1),
     xlab = "Month index", ylab = "Generation (MWh)",
     main = "Solar power: observed and 12-month forecast",
     las = 1)
lines(time_pred, Yhat, type = "o", col = "red", pch = 16)
legend("topleft", legend = c("Observed", "Forecast"),
       col = c("black", "red"), pch = 16, lty = 1, bty = "n")

dev.off()
message("Saved: myndir/2_2_forecasts.pdf")
```
2.3:
```{r}
# --- 2.3: 95% prediction intervals ---

sigma_eps <- 0.22

# Psi-weights for AR(1): psi_j = (-phi1)^j
# Variance of k-step prediction error (Eq. 5.150):
# sigma_k^2 = sigma_eps^2 * (1 + psi_1^2 + ... + psi_{k-1}^2)

Vk <- numeric(12)
for (k in 1:12) {
  psi <- (-phi1)^(0:(k-1))   # psi_0 = 1, psi_1 = -phi1, ...
  Vk[k] <- sigma_eps^2 * sum(psi^2)
}

# Prediction intervals on X scale
Xhat <- Xt_ext[37:48]
lower_X <- Xhat - 1.96 * sqrt(Vk)
upper_X <- Xhat + 1.96 * sqrt(Vk)

# Transform back to power scale
lower_Y <- exp(lower_X + mu)
upper_Y <- exp(upper_X + mu)

# Table
pi_table <- data.frame(
  k = 1:12,
  month = forecast_table$month_label,
  Yhat = round(Yhat, 1),
  lower = round(lower_Y, 1),
  upper = round(upper_Y, 1)
)
print(pi_table)

# Plot
pdf("myndir/2_3_forecast_with_PI.pdf", width = 9, height = 5)

time_obs  <- 1:36
time_pred <- 37:48

plot(time_obs, Yt, type = "o", pch = 16,
     xlim = c(1, 48), ylim = c(0, max(upper_Y) * 1.1),
     xlab = "Month index", ylab = "Generation (MWh)",
     main = "Solar power: forecast with 95% prediction intervals",
     las = 1)
polygon(c(time_pred, rev(time_pred)),
        c(lower_Y, rev(upper_Y)),
        col = adjustcolor("red", 0.2), border = NA)
lines(time_pred, Yhat, type = "o", col = "red", pch = 16)
lines(time_pred, lower_Y, col = "red", lty = 2)
lines(time_pred, upper_Y, col = "red", lty = 2)
legend("topleft", legend = c("Observed", "Forecast", "95% PI"),
       col = c("black", "red", "red"), pch = c(16, 16, NA),
       lty = c(1, 1, 2), fill = c(NA, NA, adjustcolor("red", 0.2)),
       border = NA, bty = "n")

dev.off()
message("Saved: myndir/2_3_forecast_with_PI.pdf")
```



Part 3


# 3.1
```{r}
box_data_60min <- read.csv("box_data_60min.csv")
box_data_60min
```


```{r}
# Convert tdate to datetime (POSIXct) instead of Date
# Force it via character first

box_data_60min$tdate <- as.POSIXct(box_data_60min$tdate, format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S", tz = "UTC")
head(box_data_60min$tdate)
```

Install packages
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
```

Ph
```{r}
# Individual plots
plot1 <- ggplot(data = box_data_60min, aes(x = tdate, y = Ph)) +
  geom_line(color = "blue") +
  labs(title = "Ph vs dtime")
plot1
png("myndir/plot_3_1_1.png", width = 2400, height = 1600, res = 300)

plot1
dev.off()
```

Tdelta
```{r}
# Individual plots
plot2 <- ggplot(data = box_data_60min, aes(x = tdate, y = Tdelta)) +
  geom_line(color = "Red") +
  labs(title = "Tdelta vs dtime")
plot2
png("myndir/plot_3_1_2.png", width = 1000, height = 800, res = 300)

plot2
dev.off()
```

Gv
```{r}
# Individual plots
plot3 <- ggplot(data = box_data_60min, aes(x = tdate, y = Gv)) +
  geom_line(color = "orange") +
  labs(title = "Gv vs dtime")
plot3

png("myndir/plot_3_1_3.png", width = 2400, height = 1600, res = 300)

plot3
dev.off()
```

# 3.2 split to training and test
```{r}
# Training set: up to and including "2013-02-06 00:00" (t_hour = 1,...,167)
# Test set: everything after

# Convert tdate to POSIXct first
box_data_60min$tdate <- as.POSIXct(box_data_60min$tdate, format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S", tz = "UTC")

# Split into train and test sets
train_data <- box_data_60min[box_data_60min$tdate <= as.POSIXct("2013-02-06 00:00:00", tz = "UTC"), ]
test_data  <- box_data_60min[box_data_60min$tdate >  as.POSIXct("2013-02-06 00:00:00", tz = "UTC"), ]

# Verify the split
cat("Training set rows:", nrow(train_data), "\n")
cat("Training set range:", format(min(train_data$tdate)), "to", format(max(train_data$tdate)), "\n\n")
cat("Test set rows:", nrow(test_data), "\n")
cat("Test set range:", format(min(test_data$tdate)), "to", format(max(test_data$tdate)), "\n")
```
USE train_data FROM NOW ON


# 3.3 
```{r}
# scatter

library(PerformanceAnalytics)

png("myndir/plot_3_3_1.png", width = 2400, height = 1600, res = 300)

chart.Correlation(train_data[, c("Ph", "Gv", "Tdelta")])

dev.off()
```

Another option
```{r}

p1 <- ggplot(train_data, aes(x = Tdelta, y = Ph)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", color = "orange")

p2 <- ggplot(train_data, aes(x = Gv, y = Ph)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", color = "purple")

p3 <- ggplot(train_data, aes(x = Tdelta, y = Gv)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", color = "green")

png("myndir/plot_3_3_1b.png", width = 2400, height = 800, res = 300)
p1 | p2 | p3
dev.off()
p1 | p2 | p3

```


```{r}
# auto-correlation 

png("myndir/plot_3_3_2.png", width = 2400, height = 800, res = 300)

par(mfrow = c(1, 3))
acf(train_data$Ph, main="ACF of Ph")

acf(train_data$Tdelta, main="ACF of Tdelta")

acf(train_data$Gv, main="ACF of Gv")

dev.off()
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))

```

```{r}
# cross-correlation

# Base R CCF, then autoplot
library(ggfortify)
library(patchwork)

p1 <- autoplot(ccf(train_data$Ph,     train_data$Gv,     plot = FALSE)) +
  labs(title = "CCF: Ph vs Gv")

p2 <- autoplot(ccf(train_data$Ph,     train_data$Tdelta, plot = FALSE)) +
  labs(title = "CCF: Ph vs Tdelta")

p3 <- autoplot(ccf(train_data$Tdelta, train_data$Gv,     plot = FALSE)) +
  labs(title = "CCF: Tdelta vs Gv")

png("myndir/plot_3_3_3.png", width = 2400, height = 800, res = 300)
p1 | p2 | p3 
dev.off()
```


# 3.4

```{r}
library(vars)

# Fit a VAR model with the three variables
var_data <- train_data[, c("Ph", "Gv", "Tdelta")]

# Estimate the lag order of the model (p)
# AIC column shows suggested lag order
VARselect(var_data, lag.max = 10, type = "const")

var_model <- VAR(var_data, p = 5, type = "const")  # p = lag order

# Impulse response from Tdelta to Ph
irf_tdelta <- irf(var_model, 
                  impulse   = "Tdelta", 
                  response  = "Ph", 
                  n.ahead   = 10, # up to 10 lags
                  boot      = TRUE)

# Impulse response from Gv to Ph
irf_gv <- irf(var_model, 
              impulse   = "Gv", 
              response  = "Ph", 
              n.ahead   = 10, # up to 10 lags
              boot      = TRUE)

# Plot both
png("myndir/plot_irf_Tdelta_Ph.png", width = 2400, height = 1200, res = 300)

plot(irf_tdelta, main = "IRF: Tdelta -> Ph")

png("myndir/plot_irf_Gv_Ph.png", width = 2400, height = 1200, res = 300)

plot(irf_gv,     main = "IRF: Gv -> Ph")
dev.off()

```

# 3.5

```{r}
lm_model <- lm(Ph ~ Gv + Tdelta - 1, data=train_data) # -1 removes intercept as per the equation
summary(lm_model)

```
```{r}
train_data$Ph_pred <- fitted(lm_model)

# Plot actual vs predicted
p1 <- ggplot(train_data, aes(x = tdate)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Ph,      color = "Actual")) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Ph_pred, color = "Predicted")) +
  labs(title = "One-step prediction", y = "Ph", color = "") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Actual" = "black", "Predicted" = "orange"))

p1
```
```{r}
train_data$resid <- residuals(lm_model)

# Residual plot over time
p2 <- ggplot(train_data, aes(x = tdate, y = resid)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Residuals over time", y = "Residual")

# Residual histogram
p3 <- ggplot(train_data, aes(x = resid)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density)), bins = 30, fill = "lightblue") +
  geom_density(color = "orange", linewidth = 1) +
  labs(title = "Residual distribution", x = "Residual")

# Save
png("myndir/plot_lm_pred.png", width = 2400, height = 1200, res = 300)
p1 / p2 / p3
dev.off()
```

```{r}
png("myndir/plot_lm_acf_ccf.png", width = 2400, height = 800, res = 300)
par(mfrow = c(1, 3))
acf(train_data$resid,                        main = "ACF of residuals")
ccf(train_data$resid, train_data$Gv,         main=expression(bold("c) CCF: ") * G[v] %->% epsilon[t]))
ccf(train_data$resid, train_data$Tdelta,     main=expression(bold("c) CCF: ") * T[delta] %->% epsilon[t]))
dev.off()
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
```

# 3.6
```{r}
arx_model <- lm(Ph ~ Ph.l1 + Gv + Tdelta - 1, data = train_data)
summary(arx_model)
```

```{r}

train_data$resid_arx      <- residuals(arx_model)
train_data$Ph_arx_pred    <- fitted(arx_model)

# One-step prediction
p1 <- ggplot(train_data, aes(x = tdate)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Ph,          color = "Actual")) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Ph_arx_pred, color = "Predicted")) +
  labs(title = "ARX(1) one-step prediction", y = "Ph", color = "") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Actual" = "black", "Predicted" = "orange"))

# Residuals over time
p2 <- ggplot(train_data, aes(x = tdate, y = resid_arx)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "ARX(1) residuals over time", y = "Residual")

# Residual histogram
p3 <- ggplot(train_data, aes(x = resid_arx)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density)), bins = 30, fill = "lightblue") +
  geom_density(color = "orange", linewidth = 1) +
  labs(title = "ARX(1) residual distribution", x = "Residual")

png("myndir/plot_arx_pred.png", width = 2400, height = 1200, res = 300)
p1 / p2 / p3
dev.off()
```

```{r}
png("myndir/plot_arx_acf_ccf.png", width = 2400, height = 800, res = 300)
par(mfrow = c(1, 3))
acf(train_data$resid_arx,                        main = "ACF of residuals")
ccf(train_data$resid_arx, train_data$Gv,         main=expression(bold("c) CCF: ") * G[v] %->% epsilon[t]))
ccf(train_data$resid_arx, train_data$Tdelta,     main=expression(bold("c) CCF: ") * T[delta] %->% epsilon[t]))
dev.off()
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
```

# 3.7

```{r}

max_order <- 10
aic_vals  <- numeric(max_order)
bic_vals  <- numeric(max_order)

for (p in 1:max_order) {
  
  ph_lags     <- paste0("Ph.l",     1:p, collapse = " + ")
  gv_lags     <- paste0("Gv.l",     1:p, collapse = " + ")
  tdelta_lags <- paste0("Tdelta.l", 1:p, collapse = " + ")
  
  formula_str <- paste("Ph ~ Gv + Tdelta +", ph_lags, "+", gv_lags, "+", tdelta_lags, "- 1")
  
  fit          <- lm(as.formula(formula_str), data = train_data)
  aic_vals[p]  <- AIC(fit)
  bic_vals[p]  <- BIC(fit)
}
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

criteria_df <- data.frame(
  order = 1:max_order,
  AIC   = aic_vals,
  BIC   = bic_vals
)

criteria_long <- pivot_longer(criteria_df, 
                               cols      = c(AIC, BIC), 
                               names_to  = "criterion", 
                               values_to = "value")

p_ic <- ggplot(criteria_long, aes(x = order, y = value, color = criterion)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:max_order) +
  labs(title = "AIC and BIC vs ARX model order",
       x     = "Model order",
       y     = "Information criterion",
       color = "") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("AIC" = "orange", "BIC" = "steelblue"))

png("myndir/plot_arx_order.png", width = 2400, height = 1200, res = 300)
p_ic
dev.off()
```


# 3.8

```{r}
max_order <- 10
rmse_vals <- numeric(max_order)

for (p in 1:max_order) {
  
  ph_lags     <- paste0("Ph.l",     1:p, collapse = " + ")
  gv_lags     <- paste0("Gv.l",     1:p, collapse = " + ")
  tdelta_lags <- paste0("Tdelta.l", 1:p, collapse = " + ")
  
  formula_str <- paste("Ph ~ Gv + Tdelta +", ph_lags, "+", gv_lags, "+", tdelta_lags, "- 1")
  
  fit          <- lm(as.formula(formula_str), data = train_data)
  preds        <- predict(fit, newdata = test_data)
  residuals    <- test_data$Ph - preds
  rmse_vals[p] <- sqrt(mean(residuals^2, na.rm = TRUE))
}

```

```{r}
rmse_df <- data.frame(order = 1:max_order, RMSE = rmse_vals)

p_rmse <- ggplot(rmse_df, aes(x = order, y = RMSE)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_point(size = 2,    color = "steelblue") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:max_order) +
  labs(title = "Test RMSE vs ARX model order",
       x     = "Model order",
       y     = "RMSE")

png("myndir/plot_arx_rmse.png", width = 2400, height = 1200, res = 300)
p_rmse
dev.off()
```

# 3.9

```{r}
# Fit ARX(3) using existing lag columns
arx3_model <- lm(Ph ~ Gv + Tdelta +
                   Ph.l1 + Ph.l2 + Ph.l3 +
                   Gv.l1 + Gv.l2 + Gv.l3 +
                   Tdelta.l1 + Tdelta.l2 + Tdelta.l3 - 1,
                 data = train_data)

# Combine full data
original_cols <- c("tdate", "Ph", "Gv", "Tdelta",
                   "Gv.l1", "Gv.l2", "Gv.l3",
                   "Tdelta.l1", "Tdelta.l2", "Tdelta.l3")

full_data        <- rbind(train_data[, original_cols],
                          test_data[,  original_cols])
Ph_sim           <- full_data$Ph

# Simulation loop — Gv and Tdelta lags come from data, Ph lags are iterative
for (t in 4:nrow(full_data)) {
  
  newrow <- data.frame(
    Gv        = full_data$Gv[t],
    Tdelta    = full_data$Tdelta[t],
    Gv.l1     = full_data$Gv.l1[t],
    Gv.l2     = full_data$Gv.l2[t],
    Gv.l3     = full_data$Gv.l3[t],
    Tdelta.l1 = full_data$Tdelta.l1[t],
    Tdelta.l2 = full_data$Tdelta.l2[t],
    Tdelta.l3 = full_data$Tdelta.l3[t],
    Ph.l1     = Ph_sim[t - 1],  # simulated iteratively
    Ph.l2     = Ph_sim[t - 2],
    Ph.l3     = Ph_sim[t - 3]
  )
  
  Ph_sim[t] <- predict(arx3_model, newdata = newrow)
}

full_data$Ph_sim <- Ph_sim
full_data$period <- c(rep("Train", nrow(train_data)), rep("Test", nrow(test_data)))
```



```{r}
p1 <- ggplot(full_data, aes(x = tdate)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Ph,     color = "Actual")) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Ph_sim, color = "Simulated")) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.numeric(full_data$tdate[nrow(train_data)]),
             linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  annotate("text",
           x     = full_data$tdate[nrow(train_data)],
           y     = max(full_data$Ph),
           label = "Train | Test",
           hjust = 1.1,
           size  = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Actual" = "black", "Simulated" = "orange")) +
  labs(title = "Multi-step simulation — ARX(3)",
       x     = "Time",
       y     = "Ph",
       color = "")

png("myndir/plot_arx3_simulation.png", width = 2400, height = 1000, res = 300)
p1
dev.off()
```






3 sindri
```{r}
# Read data
box <- read.csv("box_data_60min.csv")

# --- Plot the three non-lagged time series ---
if (!dir.exists("myndir")) dir.create("myndir")

pdf("myndir/3_1_sindri_time_series.pdf", width = 10, height = 8)
par(mfrow = c(3, 1), mar = c(4, 4.5, 2, 1))

plot(box$thour, box$Ph, type = "l", xlab = "Hour", ylab = expression(P[h] ~ "(W)"),
     main = "Heating power", las = 1)

plot(box$thour, box$Tdelta, type = "l", xlab = "Hour", ylab = expression(T[delta] ~ "(°C)"),
     main = "Temperature difference (inside - outside)", las = 1)

plot(box$thour, box$Gv, type = "l", xlab = "Hour", ylab = expression(G[v] ~ "(W/m"^2 * ")"),
     main = "Vertical solar radiation", las = 1)

dev.off()
message("Saved: myndir/3_1_sindri_time_series.pdf")
```
3.2 og 3.3
```{r}
# --- 3.2: Split into train and test ---
box$tdate <- as.POSIXct(box$tdate)
train <- box[box$tdate <= as.POSIXct("2013-02-06 00:00:00"), ]
test  <- box[box$tdate >  as.POSIXct("2013-02-06 00:00:00"), ]
cat("Train:", nrow(train), "rows | Test:", nrow(test), "rows\n")

# --- 3.3: Investigate variables and their relations ---
# 1. GENERATE PDF
pdf("myndir/3_3_sindri_exploratory.pdf", width = 10, height = 6)
par(mfrow = c(3, 3), mar = c(4, 4.5, 3, 1))

# Row 1: Scatter plots
plot(train$Tdelta, train$Ph, xlab = expression(T[delta] ~ "(°C)"), ylab = expression(P[h] ~ "(W)"),
     main = expression(bold("a) ") * P[h] ~ "vs" ~ T[delta]), pch = 16, cex = 0.6)

plot(train$Gv, train$Ph, xlab = expression(G[v] ~ "(W/m"^2 * ")"), ylab = expression(P[h] ~ "(W)"),
     main = expression(bold("b) ") * P[h] ~ "vs" ~ G[v]), pch = 16, cex = 0.6)

plot(train$Gv, train$Tdelta, xlab = expression(G[v] ~ "(W/m"^2 * ")"), ylab = expression(T[delta] ~ "(°C)"),
     main = expression(bold("c) ") * T[delta] ~ "vs" ~ G[v]), pch = 16, cex = 0.6)

# Row 2: ACFs (Using rho-hat for Auto-correlation as well)
acf(train$Ph, lag.max = 30, main = expression(bold("d) ") * hat(rho)[P[h]](k)))
acf(train$Tdelta, lag.max = 30, main = expression(bold("e) ") * hat(rho)[T[delta]](k)))
acf(train$Gv, lag.max = 30, main = expression(bold("f) ") * hat(rho)[G[v]](k)))

# Row 3: CCFs (Output first in code to flip lag axis, but Input first in Title notation!)
# Title g: Input = Tdelta, Output = Ph
ccf(train$Ph, train$Tdelta, lag.max = 20, 
    main = expression(bold("g) ") * hat(rho)[T[delta]*","*P[h]](k)))

# Title h: Input = Gv, Output = Ph
ccf(train$Ph, train$Gv, lag.max = 20, 
    main = expression(bold("h) ") * hat(rho)[G[v]*","*P[h]](k)))

# Title i: Input = Gv, Output = Tdelta
ccf(train$Tdelta, train$Gv, lag.max = 20, 
    main = expression(bold("i) ") * hat(rho)[G[v]*","*T[delta]](k)))

dev.off()
message("Saved: myndir/3_3_sindri_exploratory.pdf")

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 2. EXPORT PLOT DATA TO CSV
# ---------------------------------------------------------

# Save Scatter Plot Data (Raw series)
write.csv(train[, c("tdate", "Ph", "Tdelta", "Gv")], 
          "myndir/csv/3_3_scatter_data.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Extract and Save ACF Data
acf_Ph     <- acf(train$Ph, lag.max = 30, plot = FALSE)
acf_Tdelta <- acf(train$Tdelta, lag.max = 30, plot = FALSE)
acf_Gv     <- acf(train$Gv, lag.max = 30, plot = FALSE)

df_acf <- data.frame(
  lag        = acf_Ph$lag[,1,1],      
  acf_Ph     = acf_Ph$acf[,1,1],
  acf_Tdelta = acf_Tdelta$acf[,1,1],
  acf_Gv     = acf_Gv$acf[,1,1]
)
write.csv(df_acf, "myndir/csv/3_3_acf_data.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Extract and Save CCF Data (FLIPPED variables)
ccf_Ph_Tdelta <- ccf(train$Ph, train$Tdelta, lag.max = 20, plot = FALSE)
ccf_Ph_Gv     <- ccf(train$Ph, train$Gv, lag.max = 20, plot = FALSE)
ccf_Tdelta_Gv <- ccf(train$Tdelta, train$Gv, lag.max = 20, plot = FALSE)

df_ccf <- data.frame(
  lag           = ccf_Ph_Tdelta$lag[,1,1], 
  ccf_Ph_Tdelta = ccf_Ph_Tdelta$acf[,1,1],
  ccf_Ph_Gv     = ccf_Ph_Gv$acf[,1,1],
  ccf_Tdelta_Gv = ccf_Tdelta_Gv$acf[,1,1]
)
write.csv(df_ccf, "myndir/csv/3_3_ccf_data.csv", row.names = FALSE)

message("Saved: CSV data files in 'myndir/csv/' directory.")
```

#3.4
```{r}
# --- 3.4: Estimate Impulse Responses via Pre-whitening ---

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# A. Fit Models and Perform Pre-whitening
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Tdelta -> Ph
fit_T <- arima(train$Tdelta, order=c(1,0,0), include.mean=FALSE, method="ML")
ar1_T <- fit_T$coef[1]
cat("Estimated AR(1) coefficient for Tdelta:", ar1_T, "\n")

alpha_T   <- train$Tdelta - ar1_T * c(0, train$Tdelta[1:(nrow(train)-1)])
beta_Ph_T <- train$Ph     - ar1_T * c(0, train$Ph[1:(nrow(train)-1)])

# 2. Gv -> Ph
fit_G <- arima(train$Gv, order=c(1,0,0), include.mean=FALSE, method="ML")
ar1_G <- fit_G$coef[1]
cat("Estimated AR(1) coefficient for Gv:", ar1_G, "\n")

alpha_G   <- train$Gv - ar1_G * c(0, train$Gv[1:(nrow(train)-1)])
beta_Ph_G <- train$Ph - ar1_G * c(0, train$Ph[1:(nrow(train)-1)])


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# B. Calculate True Physical Weights (h_k) using Covariance
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Get Cross-Covariances (C_alpha_beta) by setting type="covariance"
C_ab_T <- ccf(beta_Ph_T, alpha_T, lag.max=10, type="covariance", plot=FALSE)$acf[11:21,1,1]
C_ab_G <- ccf(beta_Ph_G, alpha_G, lag.max=10, type="covariance", plot=FALSE)$acf[11:21,1,1]

# 2. Get the Variance of the inputs (S^2 or C_alpha_alpha(0))
S2_alpha_T <- var(alpha_T)
S2_alpha_G <- var(alpha_G)

# 3. Apply your course's exact formula: h_k = C_ab(k) / S^2
h_T <- C_ab_T / S2_alpha_T
h_G <- C_ab_G / S2_alpha_G

# 4. Calculate the scaled 95% confidence intervals
conf_T <- (qnorm(0.975) / sqrt(nrow(train))) * (sd(beta_Ph_T) / sd(alpha_T))
conf_G <- (qnorm(0.975) / sqrt(nrow(train))) * (sd(beta_Ph_G) / sd(alpha_G))
lags <- 0:10


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# C. Generate the Diagnostic & Result PDF
# ---------------------------------------------------------
pdf("myndir/3_4_sindri_impulse_responses_and_diagnostics.pdf", width=10, height=4)
par(mfcol=c(2,3), mar=c(4, 4.5, 3, 1))

# COLUMN 1: The Guess (PACF of original inputs)
pacf(train$Tdelta, lag.max=20, 
     main=expression(bold("a) PACF of Original ") * T[delta]), ylab="PACF")
pacf(train$Gv, lag.max=20, 
     main=expression(bold("b) PACF of Original ") * G[v]), ylab="PACF")

# COLUMN 2: The Validation (ACF of pre-whitened inputs)
acf(alpha_T, lag.max=20, 
    main=expression(bold("c) ACF of Pre-whitened ") * alpha[T]), ylab=expression(hat(rho)))
acf(alpha_G, lag.max=20, 
    main=expression(bold("d) ACF of Pre-whitened ") * alpha[G]), ylab=expression(hat(rho)))

# COLUMN 3: The Result (MANUAL PLOT of the h_k formula)
# Plot for Tdelta 
plot(lags, h_T, type="h", lwd=2, 
     ylim=c(min(h_T, -conf_T)*1.2, max(h_T, conf_T)*1.2),
     main=expression(bold("e) True Impulse Response: ") * T[delta] %->% P[h]),
     ylab=expression(hat(h[k])), xlab="Lag (hours)")
abline(h=0, col="black")
abline(h=c(conf_T, -conf_T), col="blue", lty=2)

# Plot for Gv
plot(lags, h_G, type="h", lwd=2, 
     ylim=c(min(h_G, -conf_G)*1.2, max(h_G, conf_G)*1.2),
     main=expression(bold("f) True Impulse Response: ") * G[v] %->% P[h]),
     ylab=expression(hat(h[k])), xlab="Lag (hours)")
abline(h=0, col="black")
abline(h=c(conf_G, -conf_G), col="blue", lty=2)

dev.off()
message("Saved: myndir/3_4_sindri_impulse_responses_and_diagnostics.pdf")

# Update your CSV export dataframe to use the new variable names
df_ir <- data.frame(lag = lags, hk_Tdelta = h_T, hk_Gv = h_G)
write.csv(df_ir, "myndir/csv/3_4_sindri_impulse_response_data.csv", row.names=FALSE)


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# D. Export All Data to CSV
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Impulse Response Data
df_ir <- data.frame(lag = lags, rho_Tdelta = rho_T, rho_Gv = rho_G, nu_Tdelta = nu_T, nu_Gv = nu_G)
write.csv(df_ir, "myndir/csv/3_4_sindri_impulse_response_data.csv", row.names=FALSE)

# 2. PACF Data
df_pacf <- data.frame(
  lag = pacf(train$Tdelta, lag.max=20, plot=FALSE)$lag[,1,1],
  pacf_Tdelta = pacf(train$Tdelta, lag.max=20, plot=FALSE)$acf[,1,1],
  pacf_Gv     = pacf(train$Gv, lag.max=20, plot=FALSE)$acf[,1,1]
)
write.csv(df_pacf, "myndir/csv/3_4_sindri_pacf_data.csv", row.names=FALSE)

# 3. Alpha ACF Data
df_alpha_acf <- data.frame(
  lag = acf(alpha_T, lag.max=20, plot=FALSE)$lag[,1,1],
  acf_alpha_T = acf(alpha_T, lag.max=20, plot=FALSE)$acf[,1,1],
  acf_alpha_G = acf(alpha_G, lag.max=20, plot=FALSE)$acf[,1,1]
)
write.csv(df_alpha_acf, "myndir/csv/3_4_sindri_alpha_acf_data.csv", row.names=FALSE)

message("Saved: All CSV data to 'myndir/csv/' directory.")
```

```{r}
# --- 3.5: Fit the Linear Regression Model ---

# 1. Fit the model without an intercept
fit_lm <- lm(Ph ~ Tdelta + Gv - 1, data = train)

# Print the estimation results
cat("=== Linear Regression Estimation Results ===\n")
print(summary(fit_lm))

# 2. Calculate one-step prediction and residuals
# For a static model, the 1-step prediction is just the fitted values
pred_lm <- fitted(fit_lm)
res_lm  <- residuals(fit_lm)



# 3. Generate Diagnostic Plots
pdf("myndir/3_5_sindri_lm_diagnostics.pdf", width=10, height=8)
par(mfrow=c(2,2), mar=c(4, 4.5, 3, 1))

# a) One-step prediction vs Actual Ph
plot(train$tdate, train$Ph, type="l", col="black", lwd=1.5,
     main=expression(bold("a) One-step Prediction vs Actual ") * P[h]),
     ylab="Heating Power (W)", xlab="Time")
lines(train$tdate, pred_lm, col="red", lwd=1.5, lty=2)
legend("topright", legend=c("Actual", "Predicted"), col=c("black", "red"), lty=c(1,2), bty="n")

# b) ACF of Residuals
acf(res_lm, lag.max=30, 
    main=expression(bold("b) ACF of Residuals (") * epsilon[t] * ")"),
    ylab=expression(hat(rho)))

# c) CCF: Tdelta to Residuals
ccf(res_lm, train$Tdelta, lag.max=20, 
    main=expression(bold("c) CCF: ") * T[delta] %->% epsilon[t]),
    ylab=expression(hat(rho)))

# d) CCF: Gv to Residuals
ccf(res_lm, train$Gv, lag.max=20, 
    main=expression(bold("d) CCF: ") * G[v] %->% epsilon[t]),
    ylab=expression(hat(rho)))

dev.off()
message("Saved: myndir/3_5_sindri_lm_diagnostics.pdf")

# 4. Export Residuals to CSV (Optional, for your tables)
df_lm <- data.frame(
  tdate = train$tdate,
  Ph_actual = train$Ph,
  Ph_pred = pred_lm,
  residual = res_lm
)
write.csv(df_lm, "myndir/csv/3_5_sindri_lm_residuals.csv", row.names=FALSE)
message("Saved: myndir/csv/3_5_sindri_lm_residuals.csv")
```
